ParkBrakePrepTime.Description: Number of ms to wait for the PLC to be setup for park brake test

ParkBrakeDriverDelay.Description: Number of ms to wait for the driver to apply the park brake

ParkBrakeApplyForce.Description: Amount of force to apply to the rollers for the park brake test

ParkBrakeSpeedValue.Description: Amount of speed to command to the front axle for the park brake test

ParkBrakeMaxDistance.Description: Maximum allowable travel for the rear wheels during the park brake test

ParkBrakeMinDistance.Description: Minimum required travel for the front wheels during the park brake test

ReleaseParkBrakePrompt.Description: Prompt tag used to tell the operator to release the park brake

ReleaseThrottlePrompt.Description: Prompt tag used to tell the operator to remove foot from accelerator

ReleaseThrottlePromptDelay.Description: # of ms to show Release Throttle Prompt

ParkPawlPrepTime.Description: Number of ms to wait for the PLC to be setup for park pawl test

ParkPawlDriverDelay.Description: Number of ms to wait for the driver to shift to park

ParkPawlApplyForce.Description: Amount of force to apply to the rollers for the park pawl test

ParkPawlSpeedValue.Description: Amount of speed to command to the non-driven axle for the park pawl test

ParkPawlMaxDistance.Description: Maximum allowable travel for the drive wheels during the park pawl test

ParkPawlMinDistance.Description: Minimum required travel for the non-driven wheels during the park pawl test

DynamicParkBrakeArmSpeed.Comment: Speed target for park brake testing

DynamicParkBrakeSampleCount.Comments: Number of samples to collect, Zero means all samples

DynamicParkBrakeSampleUseForces.Comments: Flag to determine if sampling should begin when the min force is reached

IndividualSensorTestStartDelay.Description: Time allowed for roller to get to speed

IndividualSensorSpeedDriverDelay.Description: Time allowed for operator to prepare vehicle

StartDragEarly.Description: Can we start drag test above drag speed parameter

BaseBrakeSampleCount.Description: Number of base brake samples (at 100ms intervals) to use when calculating base brake forces

NumberOfSamplesAboveLimit.Description: Number of consecutive samples above max brake force for excessive force failure

ABSValveCount.Description: Number of ABS valve pairs in the ABS system

CollectSensorSpeedData.Description: Sample sensor speeds during ABS valve firing to check for sensor/valve cross

ABSTestStartSpeed.Description: Maximum speed to start firing ABS valves at

ABSValveSequenceTime.Description: Number of ms after Valve Fire starts until sequence should be done

ABSRecoveryTime.Description: Number of ms after reduction ends until full recovery

ReductionEvalSampleDelta.Description: Number of samples used to evaluate the slope of the reduction pulse

ReductionEvalForceDelta.Description: Pounds of brake force used to evaluate the slope of the reduction pulse

ABSReferenceSamples.Description: How many brake force samples prior to reduction start to use in calculating the ABS reduction/recovery reference force

AllIsolationDelay.Description: Isolation delay after all ABS valve activity is complete

LeftFrontReductionPulseLength.Description: Amount of time to leave outlet valve open

RightFrontReductionPulseLength.Description: Amount of time to leave outlet valve open

LeftRearReductionPulseLength.Description: Amount of time to leave outlet valve open

RightRearReductionPulseLength.Description: Amount of time to leave outlet valve open

RearReductionPulseLength.Description: Amount of time to leave outlet valve open during reduction

LeftFrontReductionHoldDelay.Description: Amount of time to wait after closing the outlet valve

RightFrontReductionHoldDelay.Description: Amount of time to wait after closing the outlet valve

LeftRearReductionHoldDelay.Description: Amount of time to wait after closing the outlet valve

RightRearReductionHoldDelay.Description: Amount of time to wait after closing the outlet valve

RearReductionHoldDelay.Description: Amount of time to wait after closing the outlet valve

LeftFrontRecoveryPulseLength.Description: Amount of time to leave the inlet valve open

RightFrontRecoveryPulseLength.Description: Amount of time to leave the inlet valve open

LeftRearRecoveryPulseLength.Description: Amount of time to leave the inlet valve open

RightRearRecoveryPulseLength.Description: Amount of time to leave the inlet valve open

RearRecoveryPulseLength.Description: Amount of time to leave inlet valve open during recovery

LeftFrontRecoveryHoldDelay.Description: Amount of time to wait after closing the inlet valve

RightFrontRecoveryHoldDelay.Description: Amount of time to wait after closing the inlet valve

LeftRearRecoveryHoldDelay.Description: Amount of time to wait after closing the inlet valve

RightRearRecoveryHoldDelay.Description: Amount of time to wait after closing the inlet valve

RearRecoveryHoldDelay.Description: Amount of time to wait after closing the inlet valve

InterWheelGapDelay.Description: Amount of time to wait between consecutive wheels

CableConnect.Comment: Must have cable connect to do ABS testing

RollsUpElevDown.Comment: Must have retainers up to test anything

ProgramTireSize.Description: Write tires sizes to EC60 module

ProgramTireSizeEC80.Description: Write tires sizes to EC80 module

DisableLampGndChk.Description: Disable ABS lamp ground check EC60

DisableLampGndChkEC80.Description: Disable ABS lamp ground check EC80

EnableHrwCcvs.Description: Enable high res whl spd and CCVS trans EC60

EnableHrwCcvsEC80.Description: Enable high res whl spd and CCVS trans EC80

ParkBrakeDriverInfluence.Description: Check for brake switch during park brake

ParkPawlDriverInfluence.Description: Check for brake switch during park pawl

AnalyzeParkBrake.Description: Analyze the park brake test results

AnalyzeParkPawl.Description: Analyze the park pawl test results

NeutralCheck.Description: Wait for shift to neutral after arm speed

DragTest.Description: Base Brake Component Brake Drag Test

AnalyzeDragTest.Description: Base Brake Component Brake Drag Test Analysis

FrontDragTest.Description: Base Brake Component Brake Drag Test

AnalyzeFrontDragTest.Description: Base Brake Component Brake Drag Test Analysis

ParkBrakeStop.Description: Brake To Stop afetr park brake or park pawl test

LowSpeedSensorTest.Description: Test for the ABS Wheel speed sensor

HighSpeedSensorTest.Description: Test for the ABS Wheel speed sensor

ABSHSSensorTest.Description: Test the ABS wheel speed sensors at high speed

SBAHighSpeedSensorTest.Description: Test the SBA wheel speed sensors at high speed

IndividualSensorTest.Description: Check the wheel speed sensors at low speed

FrontIndividualSensorTest.Description: Check the wheel speed sensors at low speed

RearIndividualSensorTest.Description: Check the wheel speed sensors at low speed

SensorTest.Description: This is just a placeholder so we can auto-determine high/low speed sensor test

StartBrakeMonitor.Description: Start monitoring the brake switch to check for park brake/pawl driver influence

StopBrakeMonitor.Description: Stop monitoring the brake switch to check for park brake/pawl driver influence

IsolateAll.Description: Isolate all ABS valves at the beginning of the ABS valve firing sequence

CloseRelay.Description: Close the ABS pump motor relay at the beginning of the ABS valve firing sequence

AccelerateToABSSpeed.Description: Accelerate to Brake Test Arm Speed

BrakeToThreshhold.Description: Pre ABS start braking to min threshhold

AccelerateToParkBrakeSpeed.Description: Accelerate to Dynamic Park Brake Speed
